ksa_text: Knowledge of data classification tools and techniques, including sensitivity classification (public, internal, confidential), risk-based data categorization, classification policy implementation, and use in access control and protection strategies.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Data Quality appears in ~45% of SaMD Quality/Regulatory Affairs Officer postings as a secondary competency. Data quality for regulatory submissions and clinical evidence packages.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Include upheld. Data Quality with role-relevant signals (1) is market-supported. Final decision: include.
